data.title: 国际服联合火力演习21
data.summary: [Joint Firing Drill Preview] The new Joint Firing Drill (Escort Drill) will debut on 5/14 (Tue)! Str
data.body:
[Joint Firing Drill Preview]

The new Joint Firing Drill (Escort Drill) will debut on 5/14 (Tue)!

Strategically form units to safely escort the robot to its destination!

➡️Official Discord: http://discord.com/invite/bluearchiveglobal
